num_players
2
  handoff Validator -> Summarizer
SQL ATTEMPTS:
  [ok] SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_api_id) AS num_players
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE crossing = (SELECT MAX(crossing) FROM Player_Attributes)
  AND preferred_foot = 'left';
FINAL ANSWER: Yes — 2 players.

SQL used:
```
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT player_api_id) AS num_players
FROM Player_Attributes
WHERE crossing = (SELECT MAX(crossing) FROM Player_Attributes)
  AND preferred_foot = 'left';
```

  [Validator] validate_sql({"sql":"SELECT t.CustomerID,\n       SUM(t.Price) AS total_spent,\n       SUM(t.Price) / NULLIF(SUM(t.Amount),0) AS avg_price_per_item,\n       c.Currency\nFROM transactions_1k t\nJOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID\nGROUP BY t.CustomerID, c.Currency\nORDER BY total_spent DESC\nLIMIT 1;")
